title: Dungeon Mastering: Running D&D 5e (2024)
subtitle: DM-101 · A 3-week intensive
description: Go from never having run a game to confidently building and running your own Dungeons & Dragons campaign on the 2024 ruleset: the DM's real job and the gameplay loop, adjudicating the d20 and the new 2024 actions, running the three pillars (exploration, social, combat), low-prep adventure design, the 2024 encounter math, worldbuilding only what you use, NPCs and factions, treasure and magic items, bastions and downtime, running a session live, rulings over rules, and keeping a campaign alive over time. Built through daily lectures, prep labs, quizzes, and three projects that ladder into a playable campaign you run at the table.

lessons.title: Field Guide: The DM's Screen & Toolkit
Days 1–7: The Role, the Loop, Adjudication, and the Three Pillars
Days 8–14: Prep, Encounters, Adventures, Worlds, NPCs & Treasure
Days 15–21: At the Table, Rulings, the Campaign Over Time, and Session 1
